stdin_parsed.last_assistant_message:
`winapps-vm` command ready. Usage:

| Command | Action |
|---|---|
| `winapps-vm start` | start existing container |
| `winapps-vm stop` | stop it |
| `winapps-vm restart` | stop + start |
| `winapps-vm up` | create + start (first time / after `down`) |
| `winapps-vm down` | destroy container |
| `winapps-vm status` | show running state |
| `winapps-vm logs` | follow logs |

**First time:** use `up`, not `start` — `start` only works on an already-created container.
